# CWE-322 safe: Key Exchange without Entity Authentication (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-322-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/tls"
	"crypto/x509"
	"io"
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

func ConnectPeerRelay(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	pool, err := x509.SystemCertPool()
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	if pem := os.Getenv("RELAY_CA_PEM"); pem != "" {
		pool.AppendCertsFromPEM([]byte(pem))
	}
	peerHost := r.FormValue("relay_host")
	conn, err := tls.Dial("tcp", peerHost, &tls.Config{
		MinVersion: tls.VersionTLS12,
		RootCAs:    pool,
		ServerName: peerHost,
	})
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadGateway)
		return
	}
	defer conn.Close()
	if err := conn.VerifyHostname(peerHost); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadGateway)
		return
	}
	payload, err := io.ReadAll(conn)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadGateway)
		return
	}
	w.Write(payload)
}
